title.ko: 소형화기, 예. 피스톨 또는 라이플(연소성 또는 폭발성 추진 장약을 사용하지 않는 미사일 추진 F41B); 그 부속품
title.en: SMALLARMS, e.g. PISTOLS OR RIFLES (projecting missiles without use of explosive or combustible propellant charge F41B); ACCESSORIES THEREFOR

definition.ko: 소화기의 종류 피스톨, 리벌버 F41C3/00 어깨에 매는 소화기 F41C7/00 기타 소화기, 예. 은폐된 것, 총구에 장전하는 것, 수중에서 사용되는 것 F41C9/00 총미, 총미판, 총상 F41C23/00 부속품; 기타 세부 F41C27/00 장착 또는 운반수단 F41C33/00

title.ko: 피스톨(콘크리트 구조물, 금속벽 등에 볼트를 쏘아 박기 위한 것 B25C)
title.en: Pistols (for shooting bolts into concrete constructions, metal walls or the like B25C)
Signal pistols, e.g. Very pistols
Starting pistols; Alarm pistols
Cap-firing pistols, e.g. toy pistols
with band supply
with rotatable cap carrier, e.g. drum

title.ko: 미끄럼 운동식 뇌관 송탄자가 있는 것, 예. 클립(F41C 3/08이 우선)
title.en: with slidable cap carrier, e.g. clip (F41C0003080000 takes precedence)
Revolvers (F41C0003100000 takes precedence)
Hinge-frame revolvers
Shoulder-fired smallarms, e.g. rifles, carbines or shotguns
Pump-action guns, i.e. guns having a reciprocating handgrip beneath the barrel for loading or cocking
with reciprocating handgrip under the buttstock for loading or cocking
Lever-action guns, i.e. guns having a rocking lever for loading or cocking
Breakdown shotguns or rifles
Other smallarms, e.g. hidden smallarms or smallarms specially adapted for underwater use
Concealed pistols, e.g. in pencils
Walking-stick guns
Smallarms specially adapted for underwater use
Muzzle-loading smallarms; Smallarms with flintlock mechanisms; Accessories therefor
Details
Butts; Butt plates; Stocks
Attachment of slings
Folding or telescopic stocks or stock parts
Stocks specially adapted for recoil reduction
Recoil absorbing pads

title.ko: 피스톨용 총상 또는 손잡이(grips), 예. 리벌버(F41C 23/12가 우선)
title.en: Stocks or grips for pistols, e.g. revolvers (F41C0023120000 takes precedence)
Auxiliary stocks for stabilising, or for transforming pistols, e.g. revolvers, into shoulder-fired guns
Adjustable stock or stock parts, i.e. adaptable to personal requirements, e.g. length, pitch, cast or drop
Forestocks; Handgrips; Hand guards

title.ko: 재료의 사용에 특징이 있는 것(F41C 23/08이 우선)
title.en: characterised by the material used (F41C0023080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 총상; 총상판; 그를 위한 장착(F41C 23/08, F41C 23/10이 우선)
title.en: Butts; Butt plates; Mountings therefor (F41C0023080000, F41C0023100000 take precedence)
Stocks having space for the storage of objects
Accessories; Details or attachments not otherwise provided for
Arrangements for mounting spades or shields
Adaptations of smallarms for firing grenades, e.g. rifle grenades, or for firing riot-control ammunition; Barrel attachments therefor
Smallarms combined with thrusting or cutting weapons; Bayonets; Bayonet mounts
Bayonets; Bayonet mounts
Attachments for wire cutting
Balancing or stabilising arrangements
Means for wearing or carrying smallarms
Holsters, i.e. cases for pistols having means for being carried or worn, e.g. at the belt or under the arm
Special attachments therefor

title.ko: 소화기운반용 용기, 예. 안전상자, 총케이스(F41C 33/02가 우선)
title.en: Containers for carrying smallarms, e.g. safety boxes, gun cases (F41C0033020000 takes precedence)
Handles for carrying smallarms
